scripts.test: npm run build && docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml up -d --wait && playwright test; EXIT=$?; docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml down; exit $EXIT
scripts.test:ui: npm run build && docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml up -d --wait && playwright test --ui
scripts.test:headed: npm run build && docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml up -d --wait && playwright test --headed
